ability_gen254.name: Summon Squirrel
ability_gen254.description:
Summons a primal wolf that follows you into combat. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The wolf counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
ability_gen254.altText: The Wolf has 160 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks. Press A to give your minions an attack command.

cstri_cstbi_1.name: Cinder Strike
cstri_cstbi_1.description: Melee or bow combo with three attacks. The first attack also creates a fiery explosion, damaging nearby enemies.
cstri_cstbi_1.altText: The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 2 seconds without using Cinder Strike.

ability_gen255_cstbi_1.description: Melee or bow combo with three attacks. The first attack also creates a fiery explosion, damaging nearby enemies.

Your crows call down a single massive lightning strike on a target enemy, hitting all enemies in the area. The damage is multiplied by the number of crows contributing to it.

ability_gen484.description: Freezes enemies in a cone in front of you. Freeze lasts for 2 seconds.

ability_gen484_eq5s_1.name: Catastrophic Implosion
ability_gen484_eq5s_1.description: Slam the ground with your weapon damaging enemies in a large area and creating 2 to 4 aftershocks nearby.
ability_gen484_eq5s_1.altText: Added melee damage applies at 300% effectiveness.

ability_gen485.name: Summon Rift Beast
ability_gen485.description:
Summons a Rift Beast.

The Rift Beast has evolutions matching the evolutions of the Rift Beast that dropped this item.
ability_gen485.altText: Press A to give your minions an attack command.

ability_gen487.name: Detonate Body
ability_gen487.description: Rips apart an allied minion, dealing physical damage to enemies around it. Added damage applies at double effectiveness.

ability_gen491.name: Hammer Explosion
ability_gen491.description:
Trigger explosive devices, damaging enemies in a small area.

Your Ballista's added bow damage is applied at 250% effectiveness.

ability_gen492.name: Divine Bolt Retaliation
ability_gen492.description: Cast a bolt of divine fire towards the target.
ability_gen492.altText: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

ability_gen494.name: Summon Primal Serpent
ability_gen494.description:
Summon a Primal Serpent, a melee minion that poisons on hit. They have an unlimited duration, but do not regenerate health.

You are limited to one primal serpent at a time, but Primal Serpents do not count towards your companion limit.

Primal Serpents have 500 base health.

ability_gen495.name: Summon Crow Totem
ability_gen495.description:
Summons a totem that attacks with Swipe. It only scales with totem and minion stats, but it is affected by your Swipe Tree.

Claw Totems have 120 base health and last for 12 seconds.

ability_gen496.name: Abyssal Orb
ability_gen496.description:
An orb of pure void energy that seeks out your enemies, dealing a large amount of void damage to the target and a smaller amount in an area around them.

Added spell damage applies to the primary hit at 200% effectiveness and at 100% to the area of effect.

ability_gen497.name: Holy Fire Wave
ability_gen497.description:
A melee attack that release a wave of flames from your weapon cleaving through enemies in a cone infront of you. Deals up to 50% less damage to distant enemies. 

Deals 16 additional base fire damage. Other added melee damage applies at 200% effectiveness.

ability_gen500_1.name: Explosive Arrow
ability_gen500_1.description: Throw a highly explosive flask at a target.
ability_gen500_1.altText: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

ability_gen501.name: Hammer Throw
ability_gen501.description: Spin towards the mouse while you hold down the ability key, striking nearby enemies as you move.
ability_gen501.altText:
You have 20% less movement speed while spinning (multiplicative with other modifiers). Hits at twice your attack rate, but added damage applies at 60% effectiveness and there is a 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit. 

You cannot be stunned while spinning.

Not affected by weapon range.

ability_gen502.name: Smoke Bomb
ability_gen502.description: Melee Attack that releases a smoke cloud

ability_gen503.name: Teleport Chill Nova
ability_gen503.description: Casts a cold chill nova around you on arrival.
ability_gen503.altText: Adds 3 stacks of chill on enemies.

ability_gen505.name: Axe Throw
ability_gen505.description: Throws an axe at a nearby enemy.
ability_gen505.altText:
This is a throwing attack that scales with throwing attack damage and throwing attack speed. It is not a melee attack or spell.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

ability_gen506.name: Omen absorb
ability_gen506.description:
Feasts on the souls of {Cursed} enemies, dealing necrotic damage to them, and drawing fragments of their souls back to you. The soul fragments each grant 3 ward when they reach you.

Feasts on up to 13 enemies, prioritising those closest to you.
ability_gen506.altText: Added spell damage is applied at 250% effectiveness.

entity_fi9_98_dfn4_1.name: Sheer Cold
entity_fi9_98_dfn4_1.description: Create a burst of fire damage around a minion. Has 400% added damage effectiveness.

hs18gu_c.name: Hungering Souls
hs18gu_c.description:
Calls forth five hungering souls that seeks out enemies, on hit they deal necrotic damage and then possesses the target.

Possessed enemies take necrotic damage over time for 1.5 seconds. Enemies cannot be possessed by multiple souls at once.
hs18gu_c.altText:
Possess's damage counts as spell damage and it is affected by modifiers to base spell damage.

Added spell damage applies to the initial hit at 45% effectiveness and to possess at 75% effectiveness over its full duration.

ability_gen510.name: Burning Patch
ability_gen510.description: A Burning patch on the ground which ignites all enemies twice per second.

ability_gen511.name: Fire Burst
ability_gen511.description: An explosion that deals fire damage in an area.

vn53.name: Venom Strike
vn53.description: A slow melee attack that poisons and release a spray of venom

pr30.name: Primal Challenge
pr30.description: Pulls in nearby enemies, stunning them and increasing the duration of stuns on them for 5 seconds

iv21.name: Innervate
iv21.description: Grants 50 ward and grants 100% increased mana efficiency for 5 seconds. Can be cast instantly.

im20pa.name: Impale
im20pa.description: Calls forth thorns from the earth, impaling enemies in a cone infront of you and causing them to bleed.

ch3ll.name: Call Of The Hunt
ch3ll.description: Call your minions to hunt a specific target. The target takes 10% increased damage for 3 seconds. This debuff can stack multiple times but can only be on one target at once.

df5ku.name: Dark Fissure
df5ku.description: A powerful melee attack that leaves a dark fissure that lasts 4 seconds. Enemies near the fissure are inflected with despair, which reduces their damage by 40%.

dc5op.name: Detonate Corpse
dc5op.description: Detonates the corpse of an enemy, dealing physical damage to living enemies around it. Added damage applies at double effectiveness.

shfo22.name: Shadow Form
shfo22.description: Rapidly drains health and disables regaining health, but prevents being hit.

mm_me27_2.name: Meteorite
mm_me27_2.description: Call a meteor from the sky that deals a large amount of damage upon landing. Added damage is applied at five times its normal value.

mm_ex4tp_3.name: Acid Trap
mm_ex4tp_3.description: Throw a device to create a Decoy that taunts enemies around it for 2.5 seconds before exploding.
mm_ex4tp_3.altText:
Added throwing attack damage is applied at 600% effectiveness to the explosion.

The Decoy cannot be destroyed before it expires.

mm_ex4tp_3_fi9_1.name: Acid Trap
mm_ex4tp_3_fi9_1.description: Cast a ball of fire towards the target

mm_sw31a_4.name: Wave of Stagnation
mm_sw31a_4.description: Freezes enemies in a cone in front of you. Freeze lasts for 2 seconds.

mm_sw31a_4_sw31a_1.name: Wave of Stagnation
mm_sw31a_4_sw31a_1.description: Freezes enemies in a cone in front of you. Freeze lasts for 2 seconds.

mm_fi9_5.name: Maelstrom Bolt
mm_fi9_5.description: Cast a ball of fire towards the target. Added spell damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

mm_sw31a_6.name: Lightning Bolt
mm_sw31a_6.description: Freezes enemies in a cone in front of you. Freeze lasts for 2 seconds.

mm_fi9_7.name: Spark Bolt
mm_fi9_7.description: Cast a ball of fire towards the target. Added spell damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

mm_shiif_8.name: Sandstorm
mm_shiif_8.description: Rapidly dash a fixed distance in the target direction.

mm_shiif_8_sw42ih_1.name: Summon Wraith
mm_shiif_8_sw42ih_1.description: Summons a wraith that rapidly fades from this world, but will seek and attack your foes while it remains.
mm_shiif_8_sw42ih_1.altText:
You are limited to 6 active wraiths.

Wraiths have 60 base health.

mm_shiif_9.name: Sandstorm
mm_shiif_9.description: Rapidly dash a fixed distance in the target direction.

mm_lb23il_11.name: Ethereal Beams
mm_lb23il_11.description: Shoots beams of dark energy at up to 3 targets. The beams deal necrotic damage on hit, and the Wraithlord's added spell damage is applied at 200% effectiveness to each hit.

mm_lb23il_12.name: Ethereal Beam
mm_lb23il_12.description: Shoots beams of dark energy at up to 3 targets. The beams deal necrotic damage on hit, and the Wraithlord's added spell damage is applied at 200% effectiveness to each hit.

mm_sw31a_14.name: Soul Burst
mm_sw31a_14.description: Freezes enemies in a cone in front of you. Freeze lasts for 2 seconds.

mm_dfn4_15.name: Quicksand
mm_dfn4_15.description: Create a burst of fire damage around a minion. Has 400% added damage effectiveness.

mm_dfn4_17.name: Earthen Eruption
mm_dfn4_17.description: Create a burst of fire damage around a minion. Has 400% added damage effectiveness.

mm_dfn4_17_1_dfn4_1.name: Earthen Eruption
mm_dfn4_17_1_dfn4_1.description: Create a burst of fire damage around a minion. Has 400% added damage effectiveness.

mm_im19or_19.name: Pyroclasm
mm_im19or_19.description: Throughs a ball of ice in an arc. It explodes when it reaches the target.

mm_fm8_20_dfn4_1.name: Haemorrhage
mm_fm8_20_dfn4_1.description: Create a burst of fire damage around a minion. Has 400% added damage effectiveness.

mm_22.name: Necrotic Gas
mm_22.description: Cast a ball of void dealing moderate damage

mm_fi9_23.name: Acid Bolt
mm_fi9_23.description: Capsule Man Ability copied from Fireball. Cast a ball of fire towards the target. Has 25% chance to ignite on hit. Added spell damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

mm_fi9_23_fi9_1.name: Acid Bolt
mm_fi9_23_fi9_1.description: Capsule Man Ability copied from Fireball. Cast a ball of fire towards the target. Has 25% chance to ignite on hit. Added spell damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

mm_sw31a_28.name: Tangled Laser
mm_sw31a_28.description: Freezes enemies in a cone in front of you. Freeze lasts for 2 seconds.

mm_sw31a_28_sw31a_1.name: Tangled Laser
mm_sw31a_28_sw31a_1.description: Freezes enemies in a cone in front of you. Freeze lasts for 2 seconds.

mm_am0hr_29.name: Crystal Artillery
mm_am0hr_29.description: Throughs a ball of void in an arc. It explodes when it reaches the target, and summons an effigy of decay.
